plugins.name: agent-skills
plugins.description: Meta-plugin: installs the whole agent-skills shelf in one command.

plugins.name: brand-workshop
plugins.description: Assemble a virtual creative team and produce a brand strategy brief, tagline, and code-generated logo.

plugins.name: business-model-canvas
plugins.description: Elicit founder inputs and produce a 9-block Business Model Canvas as both a canonical Markdown file and a self-contained HTML canvas.

plugins.name: i18n-contextual-rewriting
plugins.description: Safe surgical edits for large i18n files plus culturally authentic translations via a multi-role review.

plugins.name: pitch-deck
plugins.description: Construct an investor-ready pitch deck as a self-contained HTML file (Reveal.js), with one-claim-per-slide gating and brand-aware styling.

plugins.name: skill-evaluator
plugins.description: Audit a skill to see whether its rules actually land in practice.

plugins.name: sub-agent-coordinator
plugins.description: Orchestrate multi-agent work through fan-out, pipeline, and specialist patterns.

plugins.name: team-composer
plugins.description: Assemble the right virtual team — every role earns its seat.

plugins.name: tech-stack-recommendations
plugins.description: Opinionated tech-stack guidance for new projects — runtime, frontend, API, DB, auth, hosting.
